creator: Cy.Schubert@uumail.gov.bc.ca
text:
In message <200112162340.fBGNe6V12066@catalyst.sasknow.net>, Ryan Thompson writ
es:
> 
> >Number:         32915
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       Change maintainer, update port: editors/lpe

Reading your posting to -ports, it's been a week since the first note 
was sent to the maintainer.  I would think we should give the 
maintainer a little more time to respond.  It's that time of year when 
people take time off and some people don't use vacation or "out of 
office" notification.  I don't think it would be unreasonable to wait 
three weeks, until after Christmas, maybe even longer, to assume that
the maintainer is AWOL.


Regards,                         Phone:  (250)387-8437
